hadith_entries.text:
1045. Narrated Anas ; 'The Prophet
wear the saffron-dyed garments.' (Bukhari).
forbade men to
Riyadhos-Saliheen (The Meadows of the Righteous)

1046. Narrated Abdullah ibn Amr may Allah be pleased
with them; 'The Prophet saw me in two clothes dyed in
saffron, whereupon he said: "Did your mother order you to
waer this?" (Muslim).
